shakshi: The player went underground into the Mines of Mt. Hieronymus
The player witnessed the smog, the children working every role, the normalized system — no ventilation, dust-borne illness, no single villain to point to
The player understands the children live underground with the Gnomes, separated from their parents, attending to all domestic and industrial labor
The player met Kaelith properly in the mines and heard his story
Kaelith took his own children's place in the mines — the one move available to him within the system
Kaelith taught the player to mine — the mines are now available as an ongoing activity for the rest of the game
The Gnomes are coerced into running this system — not willing participants. Series-relevant when the crystal weapon and 0022 land
The Gnomes do their best to care for the children within their limits — their cures don't always reach human physiology but the intent is genuine
Medicine 75+ — the player reached children the Gnome cures could not
The illness was seen but not treated — medicine check failed or not attempted
The mining work is done — resources collected for the shipmaker, 0016 moves closer
